SAMPLE_FUT.description: Synthetic futures contract for tests and dry runs. Replace with broker-verified specs before trading.

A_SHARE_LOW_PRICE_ETF_TEMPLATE.description: Template for low-price A-share ETF/fund board-lot testing. One qty equals one 100-unit board lot. Replace with real exchange symbol before trading.

US_STOCK_OR_ETF_1_SHARE_TEMPLATE.description: Template for whole-share US stock/ETF testing. Use swing/manual review; broker fractional support is separate.

CME_MICRO_INDEX_TEMPLATE.description: Template for CME micro index futures. Replace with exact contract, FX conversion, and broker margin before trading.
